issues.description: effectText describes a triggered ability with condition and action, but effects[] is empty. Should contain trigger, condition, and actions.
[Your Turn] in text requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn

effects.description: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, this Character gains +2000 power until the start of your next turn.
